message:
🌱 Add fluent-bit: Unable to automatically create a Kafka topic longer than 64 mission (#1806)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "fluent-bit-4337-unable-to-automatically-create-a-kafka-topic-longer-than-64-char",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "fluent-bit: Unable to automatically create a Kafka topic longer than 64 characters",
+    "description": "Unable to automatically create a Kafka topic longer than 64 characters. This issue affects 8+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify fluent-bit troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your fluent-bit deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit -n fluent-bit --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review fluent-bit configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant fluent-bit configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit\nkubectl get configmap -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=fluent-bit\n```\n## Bug Report\n\nAn attempt to start writing to a topic with a name greater than 64 characters is impossible due to a direct limitation in the code."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Unable to automatically create a Kafka topic longer than 64…",
+        "description": "This commit increases the max length of kafka dynamic topics.\n\nAs the limit previously set (64) seemed arbitrary, and kafka allows for a maximum of 249 characters per topic, I think fluentbit should reflect that limit.\r\n----\nEnter `[N/A]` in the box, if an item is not applicable to your\n```yaml\n[2021/11/17 15:37:06] [ warn]  dynamic kafka topic length > 64 not allowed\n[2021/11/17 15:37:15] [ warn]  dynamic kafka topic length > 64 not allowed\n[2021/11/17 15:37:21] [ warn]  dynamic kafka topic length > 64 not allowed\n[2021/11/17 15:37:23] [ warn]  dynamic kafka topic length > 64 not allowed\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Unable to automatically create a Kafka topic… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit -n fluent-bit --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n fluent-bit --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This commit increases the max length of kafka dynamic topics.\n\nAs the limit previously set (64) seemed arbitrary, and kafka allows for a maximum of 249 characters per topic, I think fluentbit should reflect that limit.\r\n----\nEnter `[N/A]` in the box, if an item is not applicable to your change.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "[2021/11/17 15:37:06] [ warn]  dynamic kafka topic length > 64 not allowed\n[2021/11/17 15:37:15] [ warn]  dynamic kafka topic length > 64 not allowed\n[2021/11/17 15:37:21] [ warn]  dynamic kafka topic length > 64 not allowed\n[2021/11/17 15:37:23] [ warn]  dynamic kafka topic length > 64 not allowed"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "fluent-bit",
+      "graduated",
+      "observability",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "fluent-bit"
+    ],

+    },

+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+  },
